One, I would not need to morselate the specimen for extraction as I normally do for rectal extraction because the vagina is a lot more forgiving during the pulling of a specimen through.
And two, I thought it would give me an opportunity to see a little bit more of the inside and debride more of the fistula by the cervix if I needed to, and even if I needed to remove the cervix.
